case_title: SUZANNE GAVIN RESPONDENT VS. STEVEN BROWN IND & DBA BETTER PORPERTY MANAGEMENT APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: TRIAL DE NOVO HELD IN D-525 ON WED., 07MAY03; FELICE KAPLAN, IN PRO PER APPEARS FOR APPELLANT STEVEN BROWN; NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR RESPONDENT SUZANNE GAVIN THIS DAY; THE COURT ORDERS THE APPEAL DISMISSED DUE TO NON-APPEARANCE BY PLNTF/RESPONDENT SUZANNE GAVIN; JUDGMENT ORDERED IN OPEN COURT IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT/DEFENDANT STEVEN BROWN, ET AL AND AGAINST RESPONDENT SUZANNE GAVIN. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM JOSEPH JEDEIKIN; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525, WED., 07MAY2003).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT STEVEN BROWN IND & DBA BETTER PORPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GAVIN, SUZANNE SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
